0409 [E] 976 / 2 = 488
0410 [E] 488 / 2 = 244
0411 [E] 244 / 2 = 122
0412 [E] 122 / 2 = 61
0413 [O] 3*61+1 = 184
0414 [E] 184 / 2 = 92
0415 [E] 92 / 2 = 46
0416 [E] 46 / 2 = 23
0417 [O] 3*23+1 = 70
0418 [E] 70 / 2 = 35
0419 [O] 3*35+1 = 106
0420 [E] 106 / 2 = 53
0421 [O] 3*53+1 = 160
0422 [E] 160 / 2 = 80
0423 [E] 80 / 2 = 40
0424 [E] 40 / 2 = 20
0425 [E] 20 / 2 = 10
0426 [E] 10 / 2 = 5
0427 [O] 3*5+1 = 16
0428 [E] 16 / 2 = 8
0429 [E] 8 / 2 = 4
0430 [E] 4 / 2 = 2
0431 [E] 2 / 2 = 1

=== RESULTS ===
Total steps : 431
Even steps  : 285
Odd steps   : 146
Final value : 1
